description: Reformat the tenant notification letter at /home/ga/Documents/tenant_notice_draft.docx into a standard full-block business letter. The final document must use 12pt Liberation Serif or Times New Roman font with 1.0-inch margins on all sides. The company name 'Meridian Property Group, LLC' should use the 'Heading 1' paragraph style. The 'Re:' subject line and the signer's name 'Jonathan R. Whitfield' must be bold. Include 12pt of space after each body paragraph while keeping all original text content. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/tenant_notice_final.docx.
